originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'm_has_modinfo' is never read

reasoning: 5275b1e49f6.c L16: m_has_modinfo dead store at L16. A second assignment to m_has_modinfo (different from L18 in PRODUCT_34) that is never subsequently read. PC=CONFIG_FEATURE_INSMOD_VERSION_CHECKING=T correctly constrains when this code exists. No library macros. New bug, correctly constrained PC.
